data.name: tableKpis.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="cardTotalSuppliers" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="cardTotalPayables" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="cardOverduePayables" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="cardThisMonth" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25" /><Rows Styles="Percent,100" /></TableLayoutSettings>
